hard_constraints.hard_reset_rule: If a block is missed, never push the whole day; jump to current block and log the miss. 20:00 sleep remains absolute.

daily_anchor_points.name: 起床启动
daily_anchor_points.definition_of_done: 起床、喝水、洗漱、开灯、离床、记录睡眠质量和体重。

daily_anchor_points.name: 今日AI计划确认
daily_anchor_points.definition_of_done: 输入今日临时事项/必须节点/身体状态，生成或确认当天半小时计划。

daily_anchor_points.name: 身体训练
daily_anchor_points.definition_of_done: 完成30-60分钟运动；腰椎不适时降级为走路+核心稳定。

daily_anchor_points.name: 第一顿正式饭
daily_anchor_points.definition_of_done: 蛋白+主食+蔬菜，记录饮食，不看高刺激内容。

daily_anchor_points.name: 技术主线中段审计
daily_anchor_points.definition_of_done: 确认今日芯片/EDA主线是否已有可见产物；无产物则下午优先补产物。

daily_anchor_points.name: 第二顿正式饭
daily_anchor_points.definition_of_done: 晚饭清淡，避免过饱，记录饮食。

daily_anchor_points.name: 日结与明日准备
daily_anchor_points.definition_of_done: 执行记录、技能树更新、agent输出验收、明日材料准备。

daily_anchor_points.name: 关灯睡觉
daily_anchor_points.definition_of_done: 20:00上床关灯；当天未完成事项不熬夜补偿。

side_track_rules.vocal_dance_music: Daily continuity, not daily perfection. Must produce recording/video/session file, but keep scope tiny.
side_track_rules.ai_agent: Agent work is a force multiplier, never the main career product before chip/EDA deliverables exist.
side_track_rules.business: Build cognition, expression and capital literacy slowly; do not convert it into a startup distraction before 90-day technical evidence exists.

overload_rules: If sleep quality <= 2/5, body pain >= 3/5, or anxiety >= 4/5, downgrade technical target by 40% and preserve sleep/body/food/review anchors.
If two consecutive blocks fail, insert a 20-minute walk and generate a rescue plan instead of continuing with the original plan.
If user reports urge to game/porn/doomscroll, the system must suggest a 10-minute physical interrupt and log the trigger without moralizing.
No new resource purchase unless it maps to an active skill node and has a defined deliverable within 14 days.

default_daily_success_score.excellent: All anchors + at least 1 technical artifact + exercise + one external feedback + all three art micro outputs.
default_daily_success_score.qualified: At least 5 anchors + exercise + one technical artifact or one job/external action.
default_daily_success_score.rescue: Wake, movement, one technical 30-min block, one log, sleep on time.
